reviews.text: Liz is a very effective communicator.   My family and I feel informed and prepared for the future, whatever that may be.

reviews.text: Great service and wonderful staff who are eager to help.

Exceptional Service and Peace of Mind with 49th Estate Planning

Working with 49th Estate Planning was one of the best decisions I’ve made. From the very beginning, their team made the entire will and estate planning process feel approachable, personal, and completely stress-free. They explained every step clearly, answered all of my questions with patience, and ensured that my wishes were fully understood and documented.

What stood out the most was their attention to detail and the way they balanced professionalism with genuine care. I never felt rushed or overwhelmed, and by the end, I felt confident that my affairs were in order and my loved ones would be taken care of.

If you’ve been putting off your will or estate planning because it seems too complex or intimidating, I highly recommend giving 49th Estate Planning a call. Their guidance gave me lasting peace of mind — and that’s truly priceless.
reviews.ownerResponse: What an amazing review! Thank you for sharing your feedback!

reviews.text: Very professional, thorough and very friendly.  They made everything easy to understand.  Highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: We are so glad that we were able to make this topic easy to understand! Thank you for the review!

reviews.text: 49th Estate Planning made the estate planning process easy to understand.  They provided clear objectives and deadlines to ensure everything went smoothly.  They were a delight to work with, and we feel comforted knowing we will continue to work with their team into the future.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the positive review!

reviews.text: Very satisfying to finally have everything together & a plan on how to disburse money/assets.

I am an attorney who has been lucky enough to have the pleasure of working with Liz. Liz goes above and beyond. She truly cares for her clients and is an excellent attorney. I am so grateful to have her as a resource! Liz is the best!

Everyone was pleasant, knowledgeable and helpful. The entire experience was professional and smooth. This is something I've been putting off for a long time but with your expert guidance I feel a huge boulder has been lifted from my shoulders!

We were extremely happy with Liz Smith Law in helping us with our will planning and documents.  There were so many things that we would not have thought of in this process.  They were thorough and pleasant to work with through the whole process and produced a usable set of documents for us at the conclusion.  In addition they offer on going assistance when it is needed.

We are so grateful for the care and expertise provided by Liz Smith Law. From start to finish, Liz & her team made us feel comfortable, answered ALL of our questions, and took a process that can feel overwhelming and made it ... very manageable. Highly recommend!

Liz Smith and her associates were such a pleasure to work with. Such prompt and caring service, organized and in depth with methodical formats which made it easier to gather information.  I would definitely recommend them to others.  It's nice knowing the Liz Smith Law office will follow up on our file in three years, not leaving us behind to try and remember if we had major changes in our life.
Thank you for working with us.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so very much Sue!! It was a great pleasure to work with you!

reviews.text: Mark has been an excellent source of professional meets personalization. He listens and focuses on what’s at hand, which is you! Highly recommend him to whomever is in need of top notch representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much. It was a real pleasure to work with you on getting you case resolved.

reviews.text: Such a great law firm! Mr. Choate was very professional and seemed genuinely interested in helping me out. They did a great job with keeping me updated and dedicating their hard work and time into my case. I’m very grateful to have found them!  I would highly recommend their services to others! :)
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Dana.  It was a wonderful experience working with you.  You know we're always there for you should you ever need us again.

reviews.text: Thank you, Choate Law Firm LLC. Everyone was very caring and attentive to my needs and questions and helped me and my son through a rather tough year. We call you guys , "Friends". God Bless.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Joyce. It was a real privilege to help you and a great experience to get to know you and your family. I'm glad we were able to make a difference for you and wish you the best in the future.

reviews.text: I am extremely grateful that I hired August to defend me.  He is very professional with a depth of experience in prosecution as well as defending and more important he cares with a passion.  He examined every opportunity and involved me every step of the way to a very successful outcome.  Worth every penny and then some.
August was a great lawyer for my needs. Knowledgeable, informative, and great communication. I would recommend him to anyone.

August was recommended to me by another attorney as someone who would represent me effectively and affordably; he did so much more than that. He not only helped me mitigate the damage of a bad decision I made but went above and beyond to make sure I received the best legal outcome possible. The case turned into more of a battle than either one of us expected but August continued to help me get through the obstacles, pursuing every available option. Even a year after the case was closed and his job was done when issues arose from the same case due to a clerical error he took the time to ensure the proper outcome was reached. I respect him and would certainly recommend him.
I had an excellent experience working with Mr. Petropulos. My case was out of Sitka and he was an extremely good communicator despite the distance. Highest recommendation.
Great

Really great guy very friendly and skilled professional

(Editing my earlier review) August has saved my life and reputation TWICE. He just saved me from a false charge. He called and helped me as soon as he knew it happened, without me even contacting him. He was there for me. Got the charge dropped within days, like it should have been in the first place! Couldn’t ask for a better Lawer, and would hire him any time I need one, which I have already done. He knows what he’s doing 100% and he really cares about his clients. I recommend August for anyone stuck in bad and unfair situations.
Excellent man as well as professional lawyer. He will always be my first choice in Juneau.

Where to begin... my legal experience with August was top notch. He helped me through a very dark time in my life and was able to get my case dismissed 3 months ahead of the date. I would highly recommend August for your legal needs. Thank you!! 😊

This man does an amazing job defending his clients. He was my attorney a long time ago when he worked as a public defender. He listened, he cared, and he got me justice. I trust him and that isn’t a word I use lightly. Thank you August. I can’t express enough how I would put my faith in him and how greatful I am for him sticking up for me.  Great man. Great lawyer. If you want justice and to know that you have a attorney that will protect you and look out for your better interests, you can trust in August.

August has represented me in a very professional way,his ethics are top notch.His friendship,honesty and communication helped me through a very difficult time.Very satisfied with my outcome I highly recommend him.
August is a great communicator who gives great legal advice.
I've hired August three times. I've had positive results. He does quality work at a fair price. I will continue to hire him in the future as necessary.

August is a highly skilled attorney in the courtroom and in negotiations.  He is professional, compassionate and gets excellent results for his clients.  I strongly recommend him for your legal needs.
Heather and Cathy are so helpful in the legal field for those that can't afford to pay for their services.

I was offered help, but it wasn't really what I was looking for, but maybe there wasn't enough information for the atty at the time. Hopefully it will go better this time there was extra help offered as well such as to fill out the forms, so I should have taken that offer up. I will this time.
We have used Foghorn Law for several business reorganizations and other legal needs. Megan is quick to respond, knowledgeable, and very good at her job. Highly recommended!
We had Foghorn Law help us with a family trust. We appreciate the timely and professional work throughout the process.We highly recommend!
Great

Excellent firm with a heart. Their legal team are knowledgeable, experienced, caring and genuine in their efforts to make each person's experience seamless and reduce the stress of clients as they skillful handle matters. Highly recommended.

I found the team at Baxter Bruce & Sullivan to be professional and knowledgeable. I needed help with estate planning and Jocelyn made me feel comfortable and answered all of my questions! I’m very happy with the product and would use their services again.

Very responsive and friendly!  I needed them to review a lease for me when I was renting a new apartment and they pointed a few things out in the lease I hadn’t caught at first. I’m happy they did, as I was able to discuss with my landlord before signing. They will be my first call if I need any legal advice again!

Super Rude! Nasty to me the whole time. Made an appointment with me then suddenly decided they would not help me after all immediately after making the appointment. Refuses to help me get my service dog returned to me!
Very professional and straightforward. They say what they can do for you and they do what they say. Very satisfied

The lawyers and staff were extremely helpful with contracts (and some questions I had) for my business. Gabriel Sassoon in particular was very responsive and very knowledgeable in this area which was a great help to me! Will definitely be using them again in the future.

Have had several amazing experiences with Gabriel and the rest of the lawyers and staff.  They have helped me with personal. property, business, and intellectual property issues. They are the best in town and arguably the best in Alaska.
I cannot recommend them enough.

I have the highest praise for Baxter Bruce & Sullivan. They made my estate planning easy and painless. Everyone I encountered was very professional and kind. I highly recommend them to anyone needing legal services.
